Name: insert_notes_one
SQL: WITH check_mutation_result AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "id", $2::uuid AS "author_id", $3::text AS "title") AS data WHERE data."author_id" = $4::uuid), check_count AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_mutation_result) >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT 0 FROM (SELECT constellation_throw_error('check constraint of an insert/update permission has failed', 'ZZ901')) x) END AS status), mutation_result AS (INSERT INTO "public"."notes" ("id", "author_id", "title") SELECT check_mutation_result."id", check_mutation_result."author_id", check_mutation_result."title" FROM check_mutation_result WHERE (SELECT status FROM check_count) = 1 RETURNING *), check_nested_replies AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $5::text AS "body") AS data WHERE true), _nested_replies AS (INSERT INTO "public"."note_replies" ("body", "note_id") SELECT check_nested_replies."body", mutation_result."id" FROM check_nested_replies, mutation_result RETURNING *), nested_replies_post_check AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _nested_replies WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mutation_result g WHERE _nested_replies."note_id" = g."id" AND g."author_id" = $6::uuid) AND _nested_replies."visibility" = $7::text) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _nested_replies) THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT 0 FROM (SELECT constellation_throw_error('check constraint of an insert/update permission has failed', 'ZZ901')) x) END AS status), nested_replies AS (SELECT * FROM _nested_replies WHERE (SELECT status FROM nested_replies_post_check) = 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", (SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "body" AS "body") AS "_e")) FROM nested_replies LIMIT 1) AS "replies") AS "_e")) FROM mutation_result WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_replies) IS NOT NULL
